initial_diagnostic_question.question: Does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature atrial complex(es)?

criterion_selection.question: To accurately diagnose typical premature atrial complexes, which of the following diagnostic criteria should be evaluated?
options: Presence of an RSR' pattern in leads V1 and V2
Presence of grouped beating patterns separated by pauses
Presence of an irregularly irregular ventricular rhythm
Presence of a fixed, rigid heart rate without variability

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, are there any premature beats on this ECG, where a QRS complex occurs earlier than expected time based on the preceding normal cycles?

grounding.question: In which of the following segments can you observe the premature beat? The options below refer to time ranges on the ECG signal, provided in seconds.

decision.question: Based on the finding identified above, does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature atrial complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
decision.answer: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis

criterion_selection.question: In addition to the finding you just identified, which other diagnostic criterion should be evaluated to diagnose typical premature atrial complexes?
options: Presence of ST elevation in the premature beat
Presence of a different QRS axis in the premature beat compared to normal beats
Presence of an rS pattern in leads II, III, and aVF
Absence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats
Presence of a Delta wave (slurred upstroke) on the premature beat
criterion_selection.answer: Absence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, for the QRS complex in the selected segment, is the QRS duration prolonged significantly compared to the normal beats on this ECG?

grounding.question: Which range does the measured QRS duration for the premature beat fall into?

decision.question: Based on all the findings identified so far, does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature atrial complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
